name: Glutes (Gluteus Maximus, Medius, Minimus)

landmarks.notes: Heavily worked by squats, hinges, and lunges, so direct MEV is low for most people. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2x/week; largely covered by compound lower-body training.
training_notes: Squats and deadlifts load the glutes at long lengths (deep hip flexion); hip thrusts add short-position, high-tension work. Add abduction work for the medius/minimus if targeting shape.
